# Market Access
Measuring travel time and market access are crucial for understanding how easily individuals can reach essential services, such as healthcare facilities, schools, and markets. This module will guide you through the process of calculating travel time and market access using geospatial data and tools.
## Objectives
By the end of this module, you will be able to:
- Understand the concepts of travel time and market access.
- Use geospatial data to calculate travel time to various services.
- Analyze market access based on travel time data.
## Prerequisites
Before starting this module, ensure you have:
- Basic knowledge of Python.
- Knowledge of github (code access and version control), Jupyter Notebooks (code execution), and Anaconda (environment management).

| Course | Details |
|-----|-----|
| Instructors | Benjamin Stewart, Katie McWilliams, and Walker Kosmidou-Bradley |
| Duration | 3 hours |
| Level | Intermediate |
| Software | Python, Jupyter Notebooks |
| Course Materials | [Health Access](https://github.com/worldbank/Health-Access-Metrics/tree/main/notebooks/Tutorials) |

## Additional Materials
[GOSTnets (vector analysis)](https://github.com/worldbank/GOSTnets) - A Python package for geospatial network analysis as graph, including tools for calculating travel time and market access.  
[GOSTnets (raster analysis)](https:/./github.com/worldbank/GOSTnetsraster) - A Python package for geospatial raster analysis, including tools for calculating travel time and market access.  
[Introduction to Market Access](https://wbg.edcast.com/insights/ECL-452547cc-7c5e-48f1-bec4-d633a8497e9c) - A video introduction to the concept of market access and its importance in development.  
[Health Access in Health Projects](https://worldbank.github.io/Health-Access-Metrics/docs/User%20Guide/3_raster_vector_analysis.html) - A user guide on how to use the Health Access Metrics package for raster and vector analysis, including calculating travel time and market access.
